title: うららん☆ふくへーダッシュ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Zoomie, zoom, zoooom! Ehehe, that felt great!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey! What'd you think of my run just now? I
call it the "Long Shot's Dash"!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I was reading this manga yesterday, and there was
an Umamusume named "Long Shot" in it! She
stole the show with her speedy dash!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Everyone was super shocked by her running, and she was sooo cool!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been copying her the whooole
day! And, and!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
N-now I'm super tired... Trying to be Long Shot
sure is tough!
choice_data_list: Tell her to take a break.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So they called her "Long Shot" because she won
even though nobody thought she had a shot at
victory, huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait, wait! So does that mean people will call me Long Shot if I win?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I mean, I've never come in first before!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna do my bestest, and then
someday, I'll be Long Shot too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. You can't run if you've got no
energy, huh!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's enough training for today! I'm gonna go
home and have some fun! ♪
